title: LandingPageOutput
description: Output schema for the landing-page skill. Wraps in a PipelineEnvelope.

pitch_ref.description: Slug of the upstream pitch document (without extension)

html_file_path.description: Path to index.html on the launchpad branch (always 'index.html')

branch_name.description: Git branch name on the launchpad repo (product-slug)

file_size_bytes.description: Size of the generated index.html in bytes

has_hero_image.description: Whether hero.png exists on the branch and og:image tags were added

og_tags.description: Open Graph meta tag values used in the page

image.description: og:image URL (only present if hero image exists)

sections_rendered.description: List of section types that were rendered in the HTML

responsive_validated.description: Whether the page was validated for mobile responsiveness (640px breakpoint, no horizontal scroll to 320px)

vault_note_path.description: Vault-relative path to the reference note in Obsidian

pr_url.description: GitHub PR URL (if a PR was opened or already exists)
